text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sun May 25 12:38:09 2014
New Revision: 355183
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/355183
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r355183/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/189544
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-String-Checker/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/p5-String-Checker/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-String-Checker/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:38:04 2014	(r355182)
+++ head/devel/p5-String-Checker/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:38:09 2014	(r355183)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Perl module implementing an extensible string validation interface
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Date-Manip>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Date-Manip
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
